roonHost.title: Roon Core IP / Hostname
roonHost.description: Roon Core reachable from Homebridge. Empty = UDP discovery. Docker on same host as Core: LAN IP (e.g. 192.168.1.x) often fails; use host.docker.internal (compose: extra_hosts host.docker.internal:host-gateway) or default-gateway IP from inside the container, or leave empty to try discovery.

excludeZones.title: Exclude zones
excludeZones.description: Roon zone display names that should not appear in HomeKit.

zoneDeviceType.title: Zone device type (Home app grouping)

oneOf.title: Smart Speaker (may show as unsupported on some iOS)

zoneDeviceType.description: How each Roon zone is represented in HomeKit. TV is most reliable in iOS Home under "Lautsprecher & TVs". SmartSpeaker/Speaker can look more correct but may appear as "Nicht unterstützt" depending on iOS/HomeKit version.

radioPresetCount.title: Radio preset count (top used)
radioPresetCount.description: How many radio stations to expose as presets (per zone). 0 = expose all stations (can create many tiles).

genrePresetCount.title: Genre preset count (top used)
genrePresetCount.description: How many genres to expose as presets (per zone). 0 = expose all genres (can create many tiles).

radioStations.title: Radio stations filter
radioStations.description: Empty = all stations. Otherwise only listed station names.

playlists.title: Playlists filter
playlists.description: Empty = all playlists. Otherwise only listed playlist names.
